  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Head of Marketing",
  "description": "Peachy Talent Solutions,&nbsp;a Recruitment Service Firm, is recruiting suitable qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Marketing

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mode: On-site

Job Description


	We are seeking a results-drivenHead of Marketingto manage all online sales and digital channe
	The ideal candidate will be digitally savvy, able to run ads, create strategies, and execute campaigns that drive business growth and have a basic knowledge of website management, graphics, etc.


Qualifications


	Proven experience in digital marketing or related roles
	Familiarity with digital tools and analytics.


Requirements:


	Strong marketing and digital skills
	Experience running and optimizing ads
	Ability to create and implement growth-focused strategies
	Basic knowledge of website management, content updates, and graphics
	Hands-on, execution-focused, and growth-oriented.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hire.peachytalentsolutions@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Head of Marketing Job at Peachy Talent Solutions




        
    

        
        Peachy Talent Solutions, a Recruitment Service Firm, is recruiting suitable qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Marketing

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mode: On-site

Job Description


	We are seeking a results-drivenHead of Marketingto manage all online sales and digital channe
	The ideal candidate will be digitally savvy, able to run ads, create strategies, and execute campaigns that drive business growth and have a basic knowledge of website management, graphics, etc.


Qualifications
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Proven experience in digital marketing or related roles
	Familiarity with digital tools and analytics.


Requirements:


	Strong marketing and digital skills
	Experience running and optimizing ads
	Ability to create and implement growth-focused strategies
	Basic knowledge of website management, content updates, and graphics
	Hands-on, execution-focused, and growth-oriented.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hire.peachytalentsolutions@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Client Service Manager",
  "description": "Etu Odi Communications is a full service creative agency, combining insightful brand strategy, creative communication and engaging experience in helping organisations chart the course from awareness to loyalty in the minds and hearts of its customers. We aim to help clients release the potential of their brands by making sure that their benefits are clearly defined and effectively communicated through powerful ideas around which communities of like minded passionistas can converge and interact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Client Service Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Responsibilities


	Take ownership and supervision of all elements of pitch and RFP submission processes from end-to-end.
	Formulate strategic plans/business initiatives for all brands within your care, thereby organically growing the business.
	Source new business and generate suitable leads for the agency through a defined sales funnel.
	Managing the client relationship through effective communication, problem-solving, and responding to requests.
	Takes client communication briefs and converts them into creative briefs.
	Coordination of processes within the agency from creative, media, and production to achieve the smooth running of the campaign.
	Presenting and selling creative work.
	Conduct quarterly competitive reviews of all the brands within your care.
	Ensuring that project deadlines and budgets are met, communicating, and seeking approval of any changes to these.
	Promptly respond and follow up on inquiries/queries from brand contacts.
	Develop and maintain a good job bag and billing system, which must be shared monthly.
	Maintaining accurate records of meetings, decisions, and next actions.
	Working with finance to limit write-offs, bill clients accurately, chase unpaid invoices, do reconciliations, and grow company revenue.
	Monitor and follow up on all outstanding cost estimates with clients.
	Monitor and follow up on lapsed clients.
	Update the contract management system with campaign change orders (campaign delays, optimizations, etc.) and alert the team of changes that will affect revenue.
	Manage and compile accurate and detailed weekly status reports for internal and external status meetings.
	Ensure all reports get to clients on time with zero error tolerance.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@etuodi.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-03",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Client Service Manager Job at Etu Odi Communications




        
    

        
        Etu Odi Communications is a full service creative agency, combining insightful brand strategy, creative communication and engaging experience in helping organisations chart the course from awareness to loyalty in the minds and hearts of its customers. We aim to help clients release the potential of their brands by making sure that their benefits are clearly defined and effectively communicated through powerful ideas around which communities of like minded passionistas can converge and interact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Client Service Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Take ownership and supervision of all elements of pitch and RFP submission processes from end-to-end.
	Formulate strategic plans/business initiatives for all brands within your care, thereby organically growing the business.
	Source new business and generate suitable leads for the agency through a defined sales funnel.
	Managing the client relationship through effective communication, problem-solving, and responding to requests.
	Takes client communication briefs and converts them into creative briefs.
	Coordination of processes within the agency from creative, media, and production to achieve the smooth running of the campaign.
	Presenting and selling creative work.
	Conduct quarterly competitive reviews of all the brands within your care.
	Ensuring that project deadlines and budgets are met, communicating, and seeking approval of any changes to these.
	Promptly respond and follow up on inquiries/queries from brand contacts.
	Develop and maintain a good job bag and billing system, which must be shared monthly.
	Maintaining accurate records of meetings, decisions, and next actions.
	Working with finance to limit write-offs, bill clients accurately, chase unpaid invoices, do reconciliations, and grow company revenue.
	Monitor and follow up on all outstanding cost estimates with clients.
	Monitor and follow up on lapsed clients.
	Update the contract management system with campaign change orders (campaign delays, optimizations, etc.) and alert the team of changes that will affect revenue.
	Manage and compile accurate and detailed weekly status reports for internal and external status meetings.
	Ensure all reports get to clients on time with zero error tolerance.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: jobs@etuodi.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory Officer",
  "description": "Ifeanhealth Nigeria Limited, founded in San-Francisco, California and solely focused on Africa, we are a leading multinational HealthTech company using technology to drive three (3) therapeutic areas: Orthopaedics and Musculoskeletal Solutions (Prosthetics and Orthotics), Pharmaceuticals (Woman and Child) and Tissue Restoration (Wound Healing).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Inventory Officer to manage stock levels, ensure accurate inventory records, and prevent stock discrepancies.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for monitoring inventory movements, conducting stock counts, and maintaining proper documentation to support operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and manage inventory levels to ensure adequate stock availability
	Maintain accurate records of stock receipts, transfers, and issuances
	Conduct regular physical stock counts and reconcile discrepancies
	Track damaged, expired, or obsolete stock and prepare necessary reports
	Coordinate with procurement and warehouse teams for stock replenishment
	Ensure proper storage and handling of inventory items
	Prepare periodic inventory reports for management review
	Implement inventory control procedures to minimize losses
	Support audit processes by providing required inventory documentation.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Accounting, Business Administration, Supply Chain, or related field
	Minimum of [2] years of experience in inventory or store management
	Strong knowledge of inventory management systems
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other relevant software
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Good organizational and time management skills
	Strong integrity and accountability.


Key Competencies:


	Analytical skills
	Record-keeping and documentation
	Problem-solving ability
	Teamwork and communication
	Attention to detail.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send&nbsp;&nbsp;their CV to:&nbsp;info@ifeanhealth.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Inventory Officer Job at Ifeanhealth Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Ifeanhealth Nigeria Limited, founded in San-Francisco, California and solely focused on Africa, we are a leading multinational HealthTech company using technology to drive three (3) therapeutic areas: Orthopaedics and Musculoskeletal Solutions (Prosthetics and Orthotics), Pharmaceuticals (Woman and Child) and Tissue Restoration (Wound Healing).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer
Job Location: Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Inventory Officer to manage stock levels, ensure accurate inventory records, and prevent stock discrepancies.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for monitoring inventory movements, conducting stock counts, and maintaining proper documentation to support operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and manage inventory levels to ensure adequate stock availability
	Maintain accurate records of stock receipts, transfers, and issuances
	Conduct regular physical stock counts and reconcile discrepancies
	Track damaged, expired, or obsolete stock and prepare necessary reports
	Coordinate with procurement and warehouse teams for stock replenishment
	Ensure proper storage and handling of inventory items
	Prepare periodic inventory reports for management review
	Implement inventory control procedures to minimize losses
	Support audit processes by providing required inventory documentation.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Accounting, Business Administration, Supply Chain, or related field
	Minimum of [2] years of experience in inventory or store management
	Strong knowledge of inventory management systems
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other relevant software
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Good organizational and time management skills
	Strong integrity and accountability.


Key Competencies:


	Analytical skills
	Record-keeping and documentation
	Problem-solving ability
	Teamwork and communication
	Attention to detail.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send  their CV to: info@ifeanhealth.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Financial Planning and Analysis Manager",
  "description": "Seven-Up Bottling Company Ltd is one of the largest manufacturing companies in Nigeria, producing and distributing some of the nation&rsquo;s most- loved beverages in the country like; Pepsi, 7Up, Mirinda, Teem, Mountain Dew, H2oH!, Lipton Ice Tea and Aquafina premium drinking water. SBC has recently entered into Home &amp; Personal Care category with the 2SURE brand and launched its first product, a Hand &amp; Surface Sanitizer. Seven Up boasts of nine bottling plants with state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities strategically located across various regions in the country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Planning and Analysis Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Brief


	The Financial Planning and Analysis Manager will be responsible for providing senior management and executives with the analysis and information they need to make major operational, financial, and strategic decisions.
	You&#39;ll also for be responsible for running the annual budgeting process, as well as for managing cash flow forecast models, variance analysis, and other financial performance tools.


Responsibilities


	Responsible for preparing and coordinating the annual budgeting process, for P or L, Cash flow, with variance analysis versus relevant bases.
	Managing cash flow forecast models, variance analysis of Topline and Bottomline, and other financial performance tools.
	Managing the Rolling Forecast for P or L and Cashflow, while delivering in line with the applicable timelines.
	Deliver Strategic Business Planning Cycles, in line with the strategic business objectives, looking forward to improving the sustainability and growth objectives of SBC.
	Continuous engagement with the relevant teams to ensure forecast accuracy are at acceptable limits, while improving the information pipeline YoY.
	Performing ad-hoc analysis where required to assist in management decision making, producing
	forward-looking financial models, offer strategic guidance, and provide actionable insights to drive growth and operational efficiencies.
	Evaluate and forecast the financial viability and financial impact of expansion opportunities and new initiatives.
	Assist with month-end close processes liaising with accounting to assemble accurate financials for management reporting.
	Analyze and interpret financial results compared to budgets, forecasts and other benchmarks as may be relevant. Produce regular and ad-hoc financial reports and dashboards for senior management.
	Monitor the topline as contributed by Key SKUs to strongly drive business profitability through better mix.
	Liaise with the relevant personnel to ensure COGS is optimized and being tracked at high level to avoid surprises.
	Act as a finance business partner and subject matter expert across relevant Units of the business
	Collaborate with business units to develop financial models for new projects and business cases.
	Partner with Business Intelligence team to create customized financial reports on dashboard systems to monitor business activities, develop operational benchmarks and automate manual processes.
	Support the Commercial Team to ensure that their strategies lead to Net Sales Revenue and GP growth through the business planning and forecasting processes.
	Provide analytical support in evaluation of all Commercial initiatives in terms of product launches, pricing promotional activities and direct marketing expenditure.
	Support to drive initiatives in order improve Gross Profit (Pricing, Promo optimization, Mix optimization, Product profitability).
	Prepare in-depth &amp; insightful financial analysis and decision support to the sales and category team including identification of opportunities and risks with commentaries/analytics.
	Evaluation and Monitoring of Trade Discount Incentive proposals/programs to drive promotional effectiveness/profitability.
	Provision of robust analysis and insight into pack profitability and portfolio management and preparation of value chain analysis for existing and potential products.


Requirements


	Minimum of Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Finance, Accounting and or related fields.
	Minimum of 6 years of experience in Financial Planning and analysis department.
	Chartered Accountant (ICAN or a similar Professional Body)
	Experience working with sizeable ERPs like Dynamics NAV, SAP.
	Familiarity with Excel.
	Good understanding of Systems and Core Accounting Concepts.
	Strong negotiation skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@sevenup.org&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-07",

Financial Planning and Analysis Manager Job at Seven-Up Bottling Company Ltd




        
    

        
        Seven-Up Bottling Company Ltd is one of the largest manufacturing companies in Nigeria, producing and distributing some of the nation’s most- loved beverages in the country like; Pepsi, 7Up, Mirinda, Teem, Mountain Dew, H2oH!, Lipton Ice Tea and Aquafina premium drinking water. SBC has recently entered into Home & Personal Care category with the 2SURE brand and launched its first product, a Hand & Surface Sanitizer. Seven Up boasts of nine bottling plants with state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities strategically located across various regions in the country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Planning and Analysis Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Brief


	The Financial Planning and Analysis Manager will be responsible for providing senior management and executives with the analysis and information they need to make major operational, financial, and strategic decisions.
	You'll also for be responsible for running the annual budgeting process, as well as for managing cash flow forecast models, variance analysis, and other financial performance tools.


Responsibilities


	Responsible for preparing and coordinating the annual budgeting process, for P or L, Cash flow, with variance analysis versus relevant bases.
	Managing cash flow forecast models, variance analysis of Topline and Bottomline, and other financial performance tools.
	Managing the Rolling Forecast for P or L and Cashflow, while delivering in line with the applicable timelines.
	Deliver Strategic Business Planning Cycles, in line with the strategic business objectives, looking forward to improving the sustainability and growth objectives of SBC.
	Continuous engagement with the relevant teams to ensure forecast accuracy are at acceptable limits, while improving the information pipeline YoY.
	Performing ad-hoc analysis where required to assist in management decision making, producing
	forward-looking financial models, offer strategic guidance, and provide actionable insights to drive growth and operational efficiencies.
	Evaluate and forecast the financial viability and financial impact of expansion opportunities and new initiatives.
	Assist with month-end close processes liaising with accounting to assemble accurate financials for management reporting.
	Analyze and interpret financial results compared to budgets, forecasts and other benchmarks as may be relevant. Produce regular and ad-hoc financial reports and dashboards for senior management.
	Monitor the topline as contributed by Key SKUs to strongly drive business profitability through better mix.
	Liaise with the relevant personnel to ensure COGS is optimized and being tracked at high level to avoid surprises.
	Act as a finance business partner and subject matter expert across relevant Units of the business
	Collaborate with business units to develop financial models for new projects and business cases.
	Partner with Business Intelligence team to create customized financial reports on dashboard systems to monitor business activities, develop operational benchmarks and automate manual processes.
	Support the Commercial Team to ensure that their strategies lead to Net Sales Revenue and GP growth through the business planning and forecasting processes.
	Provide analytical support in evaluation of all Commercial initiatives in terms of product launches, pricing promotional activities and direct marketing expenditure.
	Support to drive initiatives in order improve Gross Profit (Pricing, Promo optimization, Mix optimization, Product profitability).
	Prepare in-depth & insightful financial analysis and decision support to the sales and category team including identification of opportunities and risks with commentaries/analytics.
	Evaluation and Monitoring of Trade Discount Incentive proposals/programs to drive promotional effectiveness/profitability.
	Provision of robust analysis and insight into pack profitability and portfolio management and preparation of value chain analysis for existing and potential products.


Requirements


	Minimum of Bachelor's Degree in Finance, Accounting and or related fields.
	Minimum of 6 years of experience in Financial Planning and analysis department.
	Chartered Accountant (ICAN or a similar Professional Body)
	Experience working with sizeable ERPs like Dynamics NAV, SAP.
	Familiarity with Excel.
	Good understanding of Systems and Core Accounting Concepts.
	Strong negotiation skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@sevenup.org using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Civil Engineer",
  "description": "AT Limited - Our client in the real estate sector is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Maitama / Asokoro / Wuse, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	AT Limited is currently seeking a highly skilled and CIRen-certified Civil Engineer for our client in the real estate sector.
	The ideal candidate must have a strong background in civil engineering, project management, and real estate development.
	This role requires a detail-oriented professional with excellent technical skills and the ability to oversee construction projects while ensuring quality, safety, and compliance with industry standards.


Job Summary


	We are seeking a dedicated and experienced Civil Engineer to join our real estate company in Abuja.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for designing, planning, and managing construction projects, ensuring timely delivery and adherence to specifications
	This role involves collaboration with architects, contractors, and stakeholders to drive the successful completion of real estate developments.


Key Responsibilities


	Design and develop civil engineering plans for real estate projects, including residential and commercial properties.
	Oversee construction activities, ensuring compliance with CIRen standards, safety regulations, and project specifications.
	Conduct site inspections and monitor progress to ensure quality and adherence to timelines and budgets.
	Prepare technical drawings, specifications, and cost estimates for construction projects.
	Collaborate with architects, project managers, and contractors to ensure seamless project execution.
	Perform structural analysis and ensure designs meet environmental and regulatory requirements.
	Manage project documentation, including reports, permits, and contracts.
	Identify and mitigate risks related to construction processes and site conditions.
	Provide technical guidance and support to project teams and stakeholders.
	Stay updated on industry trends, materials, and technologies to enhance project efficiency.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Civil Engineering or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in civil engineering, preferably in real estate or construction.
	CIRen certification is mandatory.
	Strong knowledge of civil engineering principles, structural design, and construction management.
	Proficiency in engineering software (e.g., AutoCAD, Revit, or similar tools).
	Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and project management skills.
	Strong communication and teamwork abilities to collaborate with diverse stakeholders.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment.
	Familiarity with Nigerian building codes, safety regulations, and environmental standards.
	Goal-oriented with a commitment to delivering high-quality results.


Salary
N250,000 monthly Gross.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to:&nbsp;admin@atlimited.net&nbsp;using &quot;Application for Civil Engineer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Civil Engineer Job at AT Limited




        
    

        
        AT Limited - Our client in the real estate sector is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer

Job Location: Maitama / Asokoro / Wuse, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	AT Limited is currently seeking a highly skilled and CIRen-certified Civil Engineer for our client in the real estate sector.
	The ideal candidate must have a strong background in civil engineering, project management, and real estate development.
	This role requires a detail-oriented professional with excellent technical skills and the ability to oversee construction projects while ensuring quality, safety, and compliance with industry standards.


Job Summary


	We are seeking a dedicated and experienced Civil Engineer to join our real estate company in Abuja.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for designing, planning, and managing construction projects, ensuring timely delivery and adherence to specifications
	This role involves collaboration with architects, contractors, and stakeholders to drive the successful completion of real estate developments.


Key Responsibilities


	Design and develop civil engineering plans for real estate projects, including residential and commercial properties.
	Oversee construction activities, ensuring compliance with CIRen standards, safety regulations, and project specifications.
	Conduct site inspections and monitor progress to ensure quality and adherence to timelines and budgets.
	Prepare technical drawings, specifications, and cost estimates for construction projects.
	Collaborate with architects, project managers, and contractors to ensure seamless project execution.
	Perform structural analysis and ensure designs meet environmental and regulatory requirements.
	Manage project documentation, including reports, permits, and contracts.
	Identify and mitigate risks related to construction processes and site conditions.
	Provide technical guidance and support to project teams and stakeholders.
	Stay updated on industry trends, materials, and technologies to enhance project efficiency.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in civil engineering, preferably in real estate or construction.
	CIRen certification is mandatory.
	Strong knowledge of civil engineering principles, structural design, and construction management.
	Proficiency in engineering software (e.g., AutoCAD, Revit, or similar tools).
	Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and project management skills.
	Strong communication and teamwork abilities to collaborate with diverse stakeholders.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment.
	Familiarity with Nigerian building codes, safety regulations, and environmental standards.
	Goal-oriented with a commitment to delivering high-quality results.


Salary
N250,000 monthly Gross.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to: admin@atlimited.net using "Application for Civil Engineer" as the subject of the email.
